en: I think you have something inside of you that is worth a great deal.
ko: 당신 안에 큰 가치가 있는 무언가가 있다고 생각해요.

en: over the rooftops... of the world.

ko: W. W. 월트 아저씨 또 나왔네.

en: Now, for those of you who don't know, a yelp is a loud cry or yell.
ko: 모르시는 분들을 위해, 요트는 큰 외침이나 소리예요.

en: Now, Todd, I would like you to give us a demonstration of a barbaric yelp.
ko: 자, 토드, 야만적인 요트를 시연해 주세요.

en: Come on, you can't yelp sitting down. Let's go. Come on, up.
Gotta get in yelping stance. A yelp.
ko: 외칠 준비를 해야 해. 어, 요트.

en: No, not just a yelp. A barbaric yelp.
Oh, that's a mouse. Come on. Louder. Yelp.
ko: 요트. 오, 그건 쥐야. 더 크게 해.

en: Oh, good God, boy, yell like a man. There it is.
ko: 오, 하느님, 소년. 그래, 그렇게. 바로 그거야.

en: You see? You have a barbarian in you, after all.
